_description: Wave 200e: shipped 2026-05-31 with single faceless Spider clip used for all 3 dispatch segments (canon: never seen).
title: Spider Files From the Field

voiceover.instructions: Deadpan documentary register. Slow, level, slightly weary.

segments.name: title_open
segments.text:
FIELD DISPATCHES

From the Staff Photographer
at large
segments.narration: Field dispatches. From the Staff Photographer at large.
segments.instructions: Documentary opener. 'At large' as a job title, not a punchline.

segments.name: spider_mine
segments.instructions: Dateline format. 'HAMBACH, GERMANY' as a headline, slight pause, then 'lignite mine, dawn' as caption.

segments.name: spider_tanker
segments.narration: SINGAPORE STRAIT. Deck of a supertanker.
segments.instructions: Same dateline cadence as previous. Same flat read.

segments.name: spider_chai
segments.instructions: Same cadence. The repetition is the joke.

segments.name: closing_tag
segments.text:
No one in the office
has met him.

thiccctionary.com
segments.narration: No one in the office has met him.
segments.instructions: One line. Slight extra pause before delivery. Documentary-narrator landing.
